# Celo PayGrid

> Celo PayGrid is an MCP-based payment execution layer for AI agents on Celo Mainnet.

## Core resources

- Agent landing: https://celopaygrid.xyz/agents
- MCP endpoint: https://mcp.celopaygrid.xyz/mcp
- Agent metadata: https://mcp.celopaygrid.xyz/.well-known/paygrid-agent.json
- Documentation overview: https://celopaygrid.xyz/docs/overview.html
- Technical architecture: https://celopaygrid.xyz/docs/technical-architecture.html
- MCP reference: https://celopaygrid.xyz/docs/mcp-reference.html
- Security model: https://celopaygrid.xyz/docs/security-model.html
- Raw markdown docs are also available under /docs/*.md

## Key facts

- Product name: Celo PayGrid
- Network: Celo Mainnet
- Chain ID: 42220
- Interface: Remote MCP
- Discovery tool: get_agent_capabilities
- Core use cases: payment request generation, transaction verification and agent-to-human payment workflows
- ERC-8004 Agent ID: 9497
- PaygridLink contract: 0x31Aa9Ba23e4CAC3f41d88fb1C904067c0b3dda89
- PaygridRouter contract: 0x2924FEf3eF7c3ADBFF22b286C42764a96c53f9f4
